description_long: This is a wide, single-seat couch with a deep seat and thick, boxy armrests, upholstered in a medium brown fabric. The seat and back cushions are generously padded and integrated into the frame, giving the couch a plush and inviting appearance. The upholstery features a subtle horizontal ribbed texture with visible seam lines and minimal decorative stitching. The legs are short, slender, and slightly tapered, made of dark wood or a wood-like material, and are exposed beneath the base. The armrests are straight and level with the backrest, providing a modern, geometric silhouette. The overall design is contemporary and functional, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A wide, deep-seated brown couch with thick, integrated cushions, straight armrests, and short, tapered exposed legs. The upholstery has a ribbed texture and visible seam lines, giving it a modern, plush look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide seat, thick armrests, and integrated back and seat cushions with visible seam lines.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the seat, the straight armrest, and the short, tapered leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous backrest with ribbed upholstery and two exposed legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the straight armrest, deep seat, and short leg.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: One large, integrated seat cushion and one continuous, attached back cushion; no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Horizontal ribbed texture with visible seam lines; solid brown color with no decorative motifs.
attribute_leg_style: Short, exposed, slightly tapered legs made of dark wood or wood-like material.
attribute_armrest_design: Straight, boxy armrests at seat height, fully upholstered in the same fabric as the rest of the couch.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous, and attached backrest with integrated padding and ribbed upholstery.
